info.title: Bharat MCP
info.description: Indian Market Intelligence for AI Agents. 32 tools for NSE/BSE stock data, portfolio tracking, AI-powered screening, options chain, FII/DII flows, candlestick patterns, news sentiment, and more.

x-mcp-tools.name: get_price
x-mcp-tools.description: Get live price for any NSE/BSE stock

x-mcp-tools.name: get_top_gainers
x-mcp-tools.description: Get top gaining stocks on NSE today

x-mcp-tools.name: get_top_losers
x-mcp-tools.description: Get top losing stocks on NSE today

x-mcp-tools.name: search_stock
x-mcp-tools.description: Search for stocks by name or symbol

x-mcp-tools.name: get_52w_proximity
x-mcp-tools.description: Check if stock is near 52-week high/low

x-mcp-tools.name: get_bulk_quotes
x-mcp-tools.description: Get live prices for multiple stocks

x-mcp-tools.name: compare_stocks
x-mcp-tools.description: Compare multiple stocks side by side

x-mcp-tools.name: get_stock_chart
x-mcp-tools.description: Generate stock price chart with moving averages

x-mcp-tools.name: get_stock_news
x-mcp-tools.description: Get latest stock news from Yahoo Finance

x-mcp-tools.name: get_fii_dii_data
x-mcp-tools.description: Get FII/DII daily flow data from NSE
